metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for KMP Compose Multiplatform — scaffolding skills, quality agents, the Claude Design → Compose bridge, and the architecture-gates linter

plugins.name: cmp-scaffold
plugins.description: KMP architecture scaffolding skills for Compose Multiplatform apps

plugins.name: cmp-quality
plugins.description: KMP architecture auditing and validation agents

plugins.name: cmp-design-bridge
plugins.description: Claude Design → Compose bridge skills (design→Compose transform + cross-framework fidelity verdict); requires the cmp-design-bridge CLI from npm

plugins.name: cmp-arch-gates
plugins.description: Architecture gates for KMP/Compose (layered-module-DAG + boundary/visibility linter); requires the cmp-arch-gates CLI from npm
